items.title: Business identity
items.body: Star City Home Services is a fictional Roanoke, Virginia contractor used for local demo data. It handles repairs, punch lists, small remodels, and homeowner follow-up.

items.title: Customer update style
items.body: Customer updates should be short, specific, and sent after the field crew confirms the next step.

items.title: Photo records matter
items.body: Every completed job should keep before and after notes so the office can answer future questions without calling the field crew.

items.title: Friday office review
items.body: Each Friday, review open estimates, missing customer approvals, and jobs with incomplete closeout notes.

items.title: Owner dashboard
items.body: The owner wants one page that shows pending quotes, scheduled jobs, unread customer updates, and unresolved field notes.
